ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Date, flesh and skin, pitted, dried
Plum, flesh and skin, pitted, raw
Cherry, flesh and skin, pitted, raw

ingredients_text: Wholegrain oat flakes (44%), fruit (35%) [chopped dates, dried diced apricots (7%) (apricots, preservative (sulphur dioxide)), dried diced plum (6%), toasted coconut chips, freeze dried raspberry pieces, freeze dried sliced cherries], nuts & seeds (20%) [sunflower seeds, pumpkin seeds, chopped pecan nuts (3.5%), whole almonds].
